response.justification: Aisha demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with a strong emphasis on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning closely with the role's primary stack. Her background includes building scalable systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and developer tooling, alongside measurable impact in high-throughput environments. The breadth of her experience and leadership in technical initiatives makes her a strong fit for this senior role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven track record in AI-agent development and scalable systems
Demonstrated leadership in technical projects and open-source contributions
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js (though experience with Node.js is strong)
Some roles involved niche languages (e.g., DLang) not directly relevant to the stack
German language proficiency is basic, though English is fluent
